description: The epic war between the Pandavas and Kauravas — Dharma vs Adharma

places.name: Hastinapur
places.modernInfo: Capital of the Kuru dynasty. Archaeological remains found near Meerut.

scenes.title: Dice game of deception
scenes.description: Shakuni rigged the dice game causing Pandavas to lose their kingdom and Draupadi's humiliation

scenes.title: Pandavas exiled
scenes.description: After losing everything, the Pandavas were sent to 12 years of forest exile followed by 1 year incognito

places.name: Indraprastha
places.modernInfo: Capital city of modern India. Purana Qila (Old Fort) stands at ancient Indraprastha site.

scenes.title: The palace of illusions
scenes.description: The demon architect Maya built a palace of illusions for Pandavas where water looked like ground and ground like water

scenes.title: Duryodhana humiliated
scenes.description: Duryodhana fell into the pool thinking it was solid ground. Draupadi laughed, planting seeds of war

places.name: Kurukshetra
places.modernInfo: Brahma Sarovar here. The Bhagavad Gita was spoken here. Now a major pilgrimage city.

scenes.title: Arjuna's despair
scenes.description: Arjuna saw his relatives and teachers across the battlefield and collapsed, refusing to fight

scenes.title: Krishna speaks the Gita
scenes.description: Lord Krishna revealed the Bhagavad Gita — 700 verses on duty, karma, and the eternal soul

scenes.title: 18 days of war
scenes.description: The Mahabharata war lasted 18 days. Entire armies fell. Only 11 survivors remained on both sides

places.name: Dwarka
places.modernInfo: One of the Char Dham sites. Underwater structures found in the Gulf of Kutch matching Dwarka descriptions.

scenes.title: City built in the sea
scenes.description: Vishwakarma built the divine city of Dwarka overnight. 12 yojanas of land reclaimed from the ocean for Krishna

scenes.title: Dwarka submerged
scenes.description: 36 years after the war, Krishna departed. The ocean claimed Dwarka back as he had predicted
